Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to feed into email content generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and current offers, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling, brand-aligned marketing email using scraped product data and promotional context.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces ready-to-send email copy daily in seconds, eliminating hours of manual copywriting while maintaining consistent brand voice.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email and deploys it to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply for the R1 support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volumes with faster first-response times.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the ticket record for agent review and action.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all AI output inside the existing support workflow so agents can approve and send without switching tools, reducing resolution time per ticket.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored as HubSpot records.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved issue submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development and connections have not yet been finalized.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for decision-makers at each identified business.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches the right person directly, improving email deliverability and response rates on sublet inquiries.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Creates a repeatable, daily outreach pipeline for the sublet with zero manual effort, accelerating time-to-tenant and reducing vacancy costs.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Surfaces actionable improvements faster than manual analysis, helping reduce wasted ad spend and improve return on ad investment across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, pulling channel data including subscriber counts, video topics, and engagement metrics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator browsing with an automated search across the largest video platform, surfacing relevant creators at scale.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers matching Instagram creator profiles based on the same keyword criteria, pulling follower counts, post frequency, and niche tags.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery beyond a single platform, giving a fuller picture of each creator's cross-channel presence and audience reach.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all collected creator data and filters results to surface the most relevant creators based on keyword alignment, audience fit, and content quality signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces noise in discovery results and delivers a curated shortlist of high-fit creators, saving hours of manual vetting per campaign.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist in minutes rather than days, enabling faster partnership decisions and reducing subjective bias in selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Drive to inform personalized outreach.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message is grounded in pre-approved brand voice and proven sequence structures, reducing setup time per campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator by applying learned sequences and brand-specific prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale without manual copywriting, enabling the team to contact hundreds of creators simultaneously.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and logs delivery status for each contact.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the full send process, eliminating manual copy-paste workflows and ensuring timely, consistent creator contact at volume.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to train context for response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving reply relevance and increasing the likelihood of successful creator partnerships.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses based on learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Removes manual back-and-forth handling, allowing one team member to manage hundreds of live creator negotiations simultaneously.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts AI-generated negotiation replies to creators and captures inbound responses for ongoing conversation tracking.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiation momentum alive without delays, reducing time-to-deal and improving creator relationship quality.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual spreadsheet matching each week, ensuring accurate load sheet data is ready for distribution without human error.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the generated sales sheet and load sheet assets attached for the Must Have Monday send.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the MHM email has been built and is ready for review or send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the team informed in real time without requiring anyone to check HubSpot manually, reducing approval delays on weekly sends.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content based on new product data and DFC brand guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email drafts in seconds rather than hours, enabling faster time-to-market for new product announcements.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, attaches sales sheets, and stages them for review and scheduled sending.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Centralizes all First to Market emails in HubSpot automatically, cutting manual email build time and keeping launch communications organized.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue driven for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS analytics into the deck automatically, saving manual data pulls from the Attentive dashboard.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session data, conversion metrics, and channel attribution for the monthly reporting window.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates GA4 data extraction into structured slide-ready figures, eliminating manual analytics reporting.

Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated monthly deck in minutes instead of hours, freeing the marketing team from repetitive slide-building each reporting cycle.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms competitors by analyzing query impressions, rankings, and click-through data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints the highest-opportunity content targets automatically, ensuring every blog produced addresses real search demand rather than guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes fully structured SEO blog posts targeting identified keyword gaps, optimized for search intent, readability, and Yoast SEO requirements.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog content at scale, dramatically increasing content output without expanding the content team.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta description, and slug.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual publishing steps and ensures every post goes live fully SEO-configured, accelerating organic ranking timelines.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports vendor purchase order data including open POs, due dates, quantities, and vendor contact details for processing.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs, matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide logic, and generates a formatted DFC load sheet.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Launches Chrome automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the new week's campaign template.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order values, product mix, and last order dates.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Centralizes raw sales data for analysis automatically, replacing manual data exports and enabling near real-time customer intelligence.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts such as reorder candidates, cross-sell prospects, and win-back targets, then triggers personalized email workflows for each group.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking by automatically detecting when new session content is ready, triggering the workflow without human intervention.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a unique hosted download URL.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting DFC's B2B audiences including shops, distributors, and fleet operators based on keyword and topic inputs.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes or stages it as a new SEO-optimized post on the DFC website.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, pulls reference images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia based on the submitted year/make/model.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Gives the AI a rich, vehicle-specific research base before any content is generated, ensuring the script is accurate and contextually relevant without any manual research.

Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds, eliminating hours of manual writing and ensuring consistent tone and format across every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Removes the need for a human recording session and delivers a consistent, professional-quality voiceover every time a vehicle is submitted.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed video package — script, voiceover file link, thumbnail, and assembled video — via Apps Script webhook and logs everything into a structured row for review and publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Creates a single organized dashboard where the team can review, approve, and track every Friction Friday video without digging through email or cloud folders.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs and associated contact records including names, emails, and account details from the Dream ERP system.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with no defined connections or workflow steps established yet.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking positions, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for DFC blog URLs.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic, engagement metrics, and goal completions attributed to R1 blog content.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and extracts them for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and passes behavioral signal data to HubSpot for trigger mapping.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives inbound customer support requests and queues them for AI triage and classification.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young shares the monthly new arrivals file via Teams, triggering the agent to begin the NAG distribution workflow.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data across all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a customer completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and captures their contact data as a qualified CRM record.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad copy and corresponding performance metrics across all paid social campaigns to identify underperforming creative.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, overdue items, or project status changes that require attention or escalation.

Asana Agent.action: Interprets the Asana task data and generates a structured, prioritized summary of what needs attention, action, or follow-up.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ad copy along with performance metrics — CTR, conversion rate, impressions, and Quality Score — for ads flagged as underperforming.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, statuses, owners, and recent activity logs for the reporting period.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec — make, model, year, and any relevant fitment details — through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow automatically.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all parts DFC currently stocks that match the fitment, along with part numbers and availability.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live inventory data in real time, ensuring the catalog reflects exactly what DFC has available rather than relying on a potentially outdated static list.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Compares the Dream inventory results against the full catalog for that vehicle, identifies gaps where DFC has no stocked part, and formats everything into a structured output ready for Excel.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces inventory gaps that would otherwise require manual cross-referencing, giving Mark a complete picture of coverage and opportunity in one pass.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file showing what DFC stocks for the requested vehicle and what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, ready-to-use catalog file directly to Mark within minutes of his form submission, replacing what was previously a manual lookup and formatting process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, open purchase orders, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant work and ensuring everyone works from the same data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, flags any parts that have no on-hand stock, no open order, and no in-transit supply as dead-end items requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report that distinguishes resolvable delays from true dead-end shortages, allowing faster and smarter customer communication decisions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications based on each order's enriched status — estimated fulfillment updates for recoverable backorders and escalation notices for dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables proactive, accurate customer communication at scale without requiring staff to manually write individual status emails for every affected order.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings, capturing make, model, year, and part specifications for each fitment.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes rather than days of manual catalog research, ensuring DFC has a complete market view to work from.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts, organizing results into a formatted output sheet that shows covered and uncovered fitments side by side.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, clean reference that immediately reveals where DFC has coverage and where there are gaps worth addressing — without any manual spreadsheet work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on uncovered fitments, asking about purchasing interest in specific two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns the gap analysis into immediate market intelligence by collecting real demand signals from customers, informing which new fitments are worth prioritizing.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Gives the team a complete, real-time inventory of all live ad copy in one pull, making it possible to audit at scale instead of manually opening individual ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for specific flagged phrases or patterns, identifies exact matches, and records the ad ID, field name, and full copy context for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches every instance of a problematic phrase across potentially hundreds of ads instantly, eliminating the risk of a manual review missing something and removing hours of searching.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged list to the appropriate stakeholder showing each match with the campaign name, ad ID, field, and exact copy where the phrase appeared.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable investigation report on demand so the team can resolve compliance or messaging issues quickly with full context already included.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and routes each submission into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or sits unprocessed in a shared inbox, giving every candidate a consistent and timely experience from the moment they apply.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and application date for centralized, searchable record-keeping.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized archive of all applicants that hiring managers can access at any time without hunting through email threads.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role, classifies the applicant as approved, denied, or paused, and drafts the appropriate auto-reply message.
Resume Bot.impact: Removes the manual effort of initial resume screening and ensures every applicant receives a faster, consistent response while keeping human review focused on top candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and Drive file link into a master dashboard, with denied and approved candidates tracked in their respective tabs and paused candidates held in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline without any manual data entry, making it easy to revisit paused candidates when a role reopens.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week for pipeline movement, our completed agents continue running in the background every day, driving value across email marketing, SEO, paid media, creator outreach, support, and more. Stay tuned for more updates as our in-progress agents inch closer to the finish line!
